name: acb
description: Intent-based code review: manifest assembly + CC post-commit hook. Browser UI (Docker) configured via review_ui_* keys.
directive: Feature-branch commits must carry an ACB v0.2 intent manifest; the PostToolUse hook on `git commit` supplies the exact save command. Review via `/prove:review-ui` (Docker-based UI).

review_ui_port.description: Host port for the /prove:review-ui Docker container. Overridden by --port or PROVE_REVIEW_PORT. Auto-falls-through to the next free port if busy.

review_ui_image.description: Container image for /prove:review-ui. Tag is appended separately (default: latest).

review_ui_tag.description: Tag for the review UI image. Pin to `review-ui-vX.Y.Z` for reproducibility.
